app.title: TowerOps
app.tagline: PM/CM Operations Control for Telecom Subcontractors
auth.login.title: Sign In
auth.login.hint: Use your TowerOps account. MFA code is optional unless enforced.
auth.forgot.title: Forgot password
auth.forgot.hint: Enter your email and we will send you a one-time code to reset your password.
auth.reset.title: Reset password
auth.reset.hint: Enter the OTP sent to your email and your new password.
auth.change.title: Change password
auth.change.mismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.
auth.help: Need help? Contact your system administrator.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
